305 I5100_QUADPLG_CD I5100_QUADPLG_CD I5100 Active Diagnoses: Quadriplegia Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of quadraplegia in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
